title: visible sculk
description: Texturepack increasing visibility of sculk shriekers/sensors/catalysts
body:
## Features
Replaces the texture of Sculk Sensors, Shriekers, and Catalysts to make them easier to see,  
making cleaning the Ancient City easier.

Glowing works with OptiFine or Continuity!  
![sculk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8747e972227d54aaed623db63b33b12cc0d3e8c.png)

## Presentation

![E](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y57c97Ur/images/af0ab33c1d8a570f027ed5bc7ab91015f74e1d33_350.webp)
